allow: Bash(cat ~/.claude.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | grep -A 20 '"hooks"' | head -30; cat ~/.claude/settings.local.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | grep -A 20 '"hooks"' | head -30)

hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: Call project_memory_load before doing any work. Do not read files, write code, or answer questions until you have called project_memory_load and read the snapshot."}}'
